title: Hyperinflation History
description: Hyperinflation episodes show how confidence collapse, fiscal dominance, and monetary over-expansion can destroy currency function. Historical case studies clarify why monetary credibility is fragile.

resources.title: Hyperinflation (Wikipedia)
resources.notes: Comparative timeline and references for major historical cases.

resources.title: What Is Hyperinflation? (St. Louis Fed)
resources.notes: Policy-oriented overview with historical examples and definitions.

resources.title: Mises Library: Denationalisation of Money
resources.notes: Alternative institutional lens on currency competition and credibility.
